title: Verify Trial Corner displays correct remaining days
description: Test that the Trial Corner Hero section displays the accurate number of trial days remaining
preconditions: User has an active trial with known remaining days
User is on Trial Corner page

steps.description: 1. Log in with a trial user account (e.g., 6 days remaining)
3. Check the Hero section for remaining days display

expected_result: Hero section displays 'Trial Mode: 6 Days Remaining' or accurate count matching the user's actual trial status
